name: Spicy Glazed Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. For the marinade: Mince the garlic, ginger, green onions, and lemon peel.
2. Add the remaining ingredients to a bowl and mix well until combined.
3. Divide the marinade evenly between two large plastic storage bags.
4. Place the chicken pieces in the bags and seal tightly.
5. Let marinate at room temperature for 3 hours or refrigerate overnight. Bring to room temperature before cooking.
6. Preheat the oven rack to the center of the oven and set to 450°F.
7. Line a broiler pan or roasting pan with heavy-duty foil.
8. Arrange the chicken in a single layer, skin side down, in the prepared pan.
9. Brush the chicken with marinade, coating well.
10. Bake for 20 minutes.
11. Turn the chicken over and baste generously with marinade.
12. Continue baking until glazed and nicely browned, about 20 more minutes.
13. Baste the chicken with any remaining glaze in the pan.
14. Transfer to a platter and serve immediately.
